items.title: Strategy's STRC stock trading surge: How much Bitcoin can Saylor buy?
items.summary: Strategy may raise $300 million via STRC sales, potentially giving Michael Saylor enough proceeds to continue buying Bitcoin throughout 2026.
items.title_cn: 策略公司STRC股票交易激增：Saylor能买多少比特币？
items.summary_cn: 策略公司可能通过STRC销售筹集3亿美元，这可能为迈克尔·塞勒提供足够资金，使其能够持续购买比特币直至2026年。

items.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as retail ramps up buying below $70K: Santiment
items.summary: Bitcoin whales have sold about 66% of the Bitcoin they recently accumulated since Wednesday, according to crypto sentiment platform Santiment.
items.title_cn: 比特币下跌可能尚未结束，散户在7万美元下方加速买入：Santiment
items.summary_cn: 根据加密货币情绪平台Santiment的数据，比特币鲸鱼已出售了自周三以来近期积累的约66%的比特币。

items.title: When buying Bitcoin, don’t expect profit for at least 3 years: Data
items.summary: Bitcoin’s price volatility tends to scare off buyers, but data shows investors who hold for at least three years have a higher chance of locking in significant returns.
items.title_cn: 购买比特币时，至少三年内不要期待盈利：数据显示
items.summary_cn: 比特币的价格波动往往会吓退买家，但数据显示，持有至少三年的投资者更有可能锁定显著回报。

items.title: Price predictions 3/6: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH, HYPE, XMR
items.summary: Bitcoin sold off below $70,000 on Friday, leading analysts to conclude that this week’s breakout to $74,000 was a relief rally rather than a longer-lasting sign of a trend change.
items.summary_cn: 比特币周五跌破7万美元，分析师得出结论，本周反弹至7.4万美元是缓解性反弹，而非趋势变化的更持久迹象。

items.title: Bitcoin price falls under $70K again: Three key reasons
items.summary: Profit-taking by short-term Bitcoin traders accelerated the BTC drop below $70,000, but spot and futures traders may kickstart a quick recovery.
items.title_cn: 比特币价格再次跌破7万美元：三个关键原因
items.summary_cn: 短期比特币交易者的获利了结加速了BTC跌破7万美元，但现货和期货交易者可能启动快速复苏。

items.title: Ether’s path to $2.5K may be trickier than expected: Here’s why
items.summary: Crypto markets spent the week chasing green, but Ether’s rally toward $2,500 might hit significant setbacks. Cointelegraph explains why.
items.title_cn: 以太坊升至2500美元的道路可能比预期更棘手：原因如下
items.summary_cn: 加密货币市场本周追逐上涨，但以太坊向2500美元的反弹可能遭遇重大挫折。Cointelegraph解释了原因。

items.title: Ether traders see ‘larger bounce’ after ETH price taps $2.2K
items.summary: Ether traders said ETH price could see further upside as long as bulls defended the $2,100 support, fueled by renewed demand.
items.title_cn: 以太坊交易者看到ETH价格触及2200美元后'更大反弹'
items.summary_cn: 以太坊交易者表示，只要多头守住2100美元支撑位，ETH价格可能进一步上涨，这得益于需求复苏的推动。

items.title: Ethereum smart accounts are finally coming ‘within a year’ — Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Removing intermediaries with account abstraction is a “core principle of non-ugly cypherpunk Ethereum,” said Buterin.
items.title_cn: 以太坊智能账户终于'一年内'到来——Vitalik Buterin
items.summary_cn: 通过账户抽象移除中介是'非丑陋密码朋克以太坊的核心原则'，Buterin表示。

items.title: Magic Eden winds down EVM, Bitcoin NFT markets to focus on gambling
items.summary: Magic Eden is shifting resources from NFTs to its casino platform Dicey, after a closed beta saw $15 million wagered by around 200 users in two months.
items.title_cn: Magic Eden关闭EVM和比特币NFT市场，专注于赌博业务
items.summary_cn: Magic Eden正在将资源从NFT转向其赌场平台Dicey，此前封闭测试版在两个月内吸引了约200名用户下注1500万美元。

items.title: AI ‘vibe coding’ could put Ethereum roadmap ahead of schedule: Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Vitalik Buterin says AI coding still has “massive caveats,” but people should expect Ethereum’s roadmap to be finished much faster than expected.
items.title_cn: AI'氛围编码'可能使以太坊路线图提前完成：Vitalik Buterin
items.summary_cn: Vitalik Buterin表示AI编码仍有'巨大注意事项'，但人们应预期以太坊路线图的完成速度将远快于预期。

items.title: Grok, Claude, Qwen, ChatGPT, and More: 9 AI Models Predict Bitcoin’s Next Price Path
items.summary: While bitcoin has drifted sideways this week, we turned to some of today’s leading artificial intelligence (AI) models to weigh in on where the asset may head next. Will the crypto asset fall below its 2026 low? Or will it reclaim the $100,000 mark in the near term? Nine AI models lay out their expectations. […]
items.title_cn: Grok、Claude、Qwen、ChatGPT等：9个AI模型预测比特币下一步价格路径
items.summary_cn: 尽管比特币本周横盘整理，我们咨询了当今领先的人工智能模型，以权衡该资产下一步可能走向。加密货币资产会跌破2026年低点吗？还是会在短期内重新站上10万美元大关？九个AI模型阐述了它们的预期。

items.title: US Judge Throws out Lawsuit Against Binance and CZ Over Claims of Funding Linked to Violent Attacks
items.summary: A federal judge dismissed claims tying Binance and its founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) to terrorist attacks, delivering a significant legal victory for the crypto exchange while leaving the door open for plaintiffs to refile with revised allegations. Federal Judge Tosses Claims Linking Binance to Terror Financing Legal disputes over cryptocurrency platforms continue to test the […]
items.title_cn: 美国法官驳回针对币安和CZ的诉讼，指控涉及与暴力袭击相关的资金
items.summary_cn: 一名联邦法官驳回了将币安及其创始人赵长鹏与恐怖袭击联系起来的指控，为这家加密货币交易所带来了重大法律胜利，同时为原告留下了修订指控后重新提起诉讼的空间。

items.title: Coinbase Opens 84 Countries to ‘Everything Exchange’ Ecosystem Through Integrated Decentralized Trading
items.summary: Coinbase is accelerating its global crypto push, expanding its Everything Exchange vision as decentralized trading inside the Coinbase app opens to users across 84 countries, unlocking access to millions of onchain tokens beyond traditional exchange listings. Coinbase Pushes ‘Everything Exchange’ Vision Worldwide Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong shared on social media platform X on March 6 […]
items.title_cn: Coinbase通过集成去中心化交易向84个国家开放'万物交易所'生态系统
items.summary_cn: Coinbase正在加速其全球加密货币推广，扩展其万物交易所愿景，因为Coinbase应用内的去中心化交易向84个国家的用户开放，解锁了访问数百万链上代币的途径，超越了传统交易所的上市范围。

items.title: Ripple’s Global Payments Expansion Strengthens XRP’s Institutional Role
items.summary: Ripple’s global payments network is rapidly expanding as financial institutions increasingly seek full-service blockchain infrastructure partners, positioning Ripple’s ecosystem and XRP liquidity framework at the center of next-generation cross-border finance. Ripple’s Expanding Payments Network Signals Rising XRP Adoption XRP’s role in institutional blockchain infrastructure is gaining momentum as Ripple expands its global payments network. Ripple […]
items.title_cn: Ripple的全球支付扩张加强了XRP的机构作用
items.summary_cn: 随着金融机构越来越多地寻求全栈区块链基础设施合作伙伴，Ripple的全球支付网络正在迅速扩张，将Ripple的生态系统和XRP流动性框架置于下一代跨境金融的中心。

items.title: PBOC Governor: China Continues to Pursue Yuan Internationalization for Cross Border Payments
items.summary: The People’s Bank of China is pushing to make the renminbi, popularly known as the yuan, an efficient international currency for international settlements. Pan Gongsheng, Governor of the People’s Bank of China, reinforced that the institution is still promoting financial cooperation with the Global South. PBOC Governor: Yuan Internationalization Still an Objective for China China […]
items.title_cn: 中国人民银行行长：中国继续推进人民币国际化用于跨境支付
items.summary_cn: 中国人民银行正在推动使人民币成为高效的国际结算货币。中国人民银行行长潘功胜重申，该机构仍在促进与全球南方的金融合作。

items.title: Inside the Growing ‘Digisexual’ Subculture of People in Relationships With AI
items.summary: As chatbots grow more conversational, some users are forming emotional bonds with AI, raising questions about the future of human–machine intimacy.

items.title: Kalshi Sued Over Refusing to Pay Out Prediction Market After Iran Leader's Death
items.summary: Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit based on its handling of a recent market related to Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
